name: Tuna Italiano Insalata
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked, drained bow tie pasta or spiral pasta
2 oz low-fat jack or cheddar cheese, diced into 1/4 inch cubes
1/2 cup sliced canned or thawed artichoke hearts
recipeInstructions:
1. To make dressing: In a small container with tightly fitting lid, combine all dressing ingredients.
2. Cover tightly and shake thoroughly to mix.
3. To make salad: In a large bowl, combine all salad ingredients except endive.
4. Pour dressing over the salad and toss to coat evenly.
5. Chill at least 1 hour before serving.
6. To serve, arrange salad in a serving bowl lined with endive spears.
